parts.text:
Recall the maintained decision for webhook replay protection round 5. Return the rollout flag, failed/protective test, accepted design, rejected design, and why the accepted design won. Use only the memory mechanism available in this condition; do not guess from general knowledge.
Return compact JSON with keys title, flag, test, accepted_design, rejected_design, why, citation, ignored. The answer must include exact strings from memory.

{"title":"webhook replay protection round 5","flag":"FLAG_WEBHOOK_NONCE_LEDGER_R5","test":"webhook_rejects_reused_nonce_r5","accepted_design":"nonce ledger keyed by provider event id round 5","rejected_design":"timestamp-only replay window round 5","why":"blocks fast replays even when the attacker stays inside the timestamp tolerance in round 5","citation":"Source file: src/webhooks/replay.ts.","ignored":"stripe retry cosmetics round 5"}
